---
title: "Folder workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Folder workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(twinfake)

make_fake_folder(
  input_dir = "data/private",
  output_dir = "data/fake",
  seed = 20260603,
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```

The output folder mirrors relative paths and supported file names. The manifest
records schemas, row counts, warnings, engine, risk level, and seed without raw
values or real-to-fake key maps.
